scripts.test: pnpm --filter @fodmap/ui test && pnpm --filter @fodmap/storybook test && pnpm --filter @fodmap/app test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @fodmap/content-config typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/types typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/storybook typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/app typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/marketing typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/research typecheck
scripts.check:all: ./.github/scripts/quality-gate.sh && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm tokens:check && pnpm tailwind:styles:check && pnpm ui:build && pnpm ui:styles:check && pnpm ui:typecheck && pnpm ui:test && pnpm --filter @fodmap/storybook typecheck && pnpm storybook:build && pnpm storybook:test && pnpm app:test && pnpm app:typecheck && pnpm app:build && pnpm marketing:typecheck && pnpm marketing:build && pnpm research:typecheck && pnpm research:build
